message:
chore: expand .gitignore with broad agent scratch patterns

Add patterns for root-level agent-generated files that aren't caught
by existing specific patterns:
- /*.txt, /*.json, /*.sh, /*.py, /*.md (with !README.md etc. exceptions)
- .beads_recovery/ directory
- /check_result_* (extensionless scratch output)
- Empty test stubs in crates/fr-server/tests/
- MCP config files (codex/cursor/gemini.mcp.json)

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 (1M context) <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -136,3 +136,33 @@ ubs_*.jsonl
 
 # Persisted Redis RDB dumps from scratch sessions
 /dump.rdb
+
+# Root-level agent scratch output (covers chk, diff, status, cargo output, etc.)
+/*.txt
+/*.json
+!package.json
+/*.sh
+/*.py
+/*.md
+!README.md
+!FEATURE_PARITY.md
+!CHANGELOG.md
+!AGENTS.md
+!CONTRIBUTING.md
+!LICENSE*
+
+# Beads recovery artifacts
+.beads_recovery/
+
+# Extensionless scratch output files
+/check_result_*
+
+# Empty test stubs (agent-generated, never completed)
+crates/fr-server/tests/replica_of_replica.rs
+crates/fr-server/tests/test_replica_of_replica.rs
+
+# ACFS MCP config files
+codex.mcp.json
+cursor.mcp.json
+gemini.mcp.json
+.opencode.json.*.bak
